# @agent-os/telemetry-otlp Public API

Status: Telemetry OTLP adapter public exports are limited to the mapping version, OTLP span DTOs, and pure projection function.

## Public exports

- `.:OTLP_GENAI_SEMCONV_MAPPING_VERSION`
- `.:OtlpAttributeValue`
- `.:OtlpProjectionSpan`
- `.:OtlpProjection`
- `.:projectOtlpSpans`

## Experimental exports

None.

## Deprecated exports

None.

## Internal-only exports

Any package file or symbol not listed above.
